title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive Fidji Simo is stepping down from her full-time role after an extended medical leave, creating a leadership vacuum as the company pursues an IPO and competes with Anthropic in enterprise markets.
content: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.

zh.title: Fidji Simo 从 OpenAI 第二把手职位退下
zh.summary: OpenAI 第二把手执行官 Fidji Simo 在长期休病假后从全职职位退下，为公司进行 IPO 和与 Anthropic 在企业市场竞争时造成领导力空缺。

title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
summary: OpenAI's AGI chief Fidji Simo is transitioning to a part-time advisory role due to a neuroimmune condition, marking another executive departure alongside departures of COO Brad Lightcap and CMO Kate Rouch.
content:
OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X.
The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a neuroimmune condition, shortly after she had taken on the AGI chief title. (She had formerly been the company's CEO of applications). Around the same time, COO Brad Lightcap also stepped down from his role to focus on "special projects," and OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch also stepped down in order to focus on her health. Rouch planned to return to a "more narrowly scoped role" when her health  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Fidji Simo 因病从 OpenAI AGI 工作领导职位退下
zh.summary: OpenAI AGI 负责人 Fidji Simo 因神经免疫疾病转入兼职顾问角色，这是继 COO Brad Lightcap 和 CMO Kate Rouch 离职后的又一高管离职。

title: Netflix reportedly considers adding always-on channels
summary: Netflix is exploring always-on streaming channels similar to Pluto TV and considering bundles with competing services to diversify revenue beyond its subscription tiers.
content:
Netflix is thinking about adding always-on channels that would stream specific shows and movies, according to The Wall Street Journal. The move sounds like a Netflix version of always-on services like Pluto TV and Tubi, except the big hook for those is that they're free - because of the ads you have to watch. Netflix has seen success with its ad-supported tier, which is increasingly popular, but it costs $8.99 per month after a recent price hike. 
Netflix is also apparently considering selling bundles that would include other streaming services, something else that competitors like Apple TV and Prime Video already offer. The company has bee …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix 据报考虑添加持续在线频道
zh.summary: Netflix 正在探索类似 Pluto TV 的持续在线流媒体频道，并考虑与竞争对手服务捆绑销售，以使收入来源多样化，超越其订阅级别。

title: Flores Hobbits' eating habits offer clues about their evolutionary past
summary: Research on Homo floresiensis eating habits suggests the extinct hobbit species may not have been fire-using hunters, potentially reshaping understanding of their evolutionary origins and island adaptation.
content: If Homo floresiensis wasn't a fire-using hunter, its origins could be different than we thought.

zh.title: 弗洛雷斯小矮人的饮食习惯揭示其进化历史的线索
zh.summary: 对古人类（Homo floresiensis）饮食习惯的研究表明，这个已灭绝的小矮人物种可能不是使用火的猎人，有望重新塑造我们对其进化起源和岛屿适应的理解。

title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
summary: OpenAI has released its GPT-5.6 model family with improvements across multiple domains including cybersecurity capabilities.
content: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

zh.title: OpenAI推出新的GPT-5.6模型系列
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了其GPT-5.6模型系列，在包括网络安全能力在内的多个领域都有改进。

title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
summary: Enterprise AI startup Lyzr deployed its own AI agent to manage a $100 million fundraising round, demonstrating practical agentic capabilities to investors.
content: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

zh.title: 一家AI代理初创公司让其AI代理运管其1亿美元融资
zh.summary: 企业AI初创公司Lyzr部署了自己的AI代理来管理一轮1亿美元的融资，向投资者展示了实际的AI代理能力。

title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
summary: OpenAI is discontinuing its Atlas AI browser after less than a year but integrating agentic browsing features into its desktop app and Chrome extension.
content: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

zh.title: OpenAI 关闭 Atlas，但其 AI 浏览器雄心仍在增长
zh.summary: OpenAI 在不到一年后停止了其 Atlas AI 浏览器，但将代理浏览功能集成到其桌面应用和 Chrome 扩展中。

title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
summary: Elon Musk has praised Anthropic's models and pledged not to "cut off" the company's access to hosting infrastructure, addressing potential concerns about relying on his companies for critical AI infrastructure.
content: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克赞扬 Mythos/Fable，承诺不会"切断" Anthropic
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克赞扬了 Anthropic 的模型，并承诺不会"切断"该公司对托管基础设施的访问权限，解决了关于依赖其公司提供关键 AI 基础设施的潜在担忧。

title: Michigan's explosive outbreak of diarrheal parasite jumps to over 1,200 cases
summary: Michigan is experiencing a significant outbreak of a diarrheal parasite with over 1,200 cases, while neighboring Ohio has reported more than 500 cases.
content: In neighboring Ohio, cases have reportedly reached over 500.

zh.title: 密歇根州腹泻寄生虫爆发跃升至 1,200 多例
zh.summary: 密歇根州正经历腹泻寄生虫的重大爆发，已有 1,200 多例病例，而邻近的俄亥俄州已报告超过 500 例。

title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
summary: The debate over AI's return on investment has intensified as companies grapple with whether multibillion-dollar infrastructure investments will deliver proportional economic returns.
content: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

zh.title: AI能否回答三万亿美元的问题？
zh.summary: 随着企业思考数十亿美元的基础设施投资是否能带来相应的经济回报，人工智能投资回报率的辩论日益激烈。

title: OpenAI wants its new tool to do your work for you and with you
summary: OpenAI's rebranded Codex tool promises autonomous workflows capable of running independently for extended periods, positioning it as both a work replacement and collaborative assistant.
content: Rebranded Codex promises independent workflows that can run "for hours if needed."

zh.title: OpenAI希望其新工具能为你完成工作，也能与你协作
zh.summary: OpenAI重新品牌化的Codex工具承诺提供能够独立运行长时间的自主工作流，将其定位为既是工作替代品也是协作助手。

title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
summary: A Windows Defender zero-day vulnerability could allow attackers to fill hard disks, as Microsoft continues disputes with security researcher NightmareEclipse over vulnerability disclosure practices.
content: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.

zh.title: Windows Defender零日漏洞补丁可能允许攻击者填满硬盘
zh.summary: 一个Windows Defender零日漏洞可能允许攻击者填满硬盘，微软继续与安全研究员NightmareEclipse就漏洞披露实践进行争执。

title: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
summary: OpenAI is shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its task-automation browser tool, less than a year after launch, with deprecation targeted for August 9th. The discontinuation reflects OpenAI's strategy to consolidate products and prioritize productivity features to compete with Anthropic.
content:
OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be "sunsetting" Atlas and is targeting an August 9th date for deprecation.
The shutdown follows OpenAI's push to reduce "side quests" and catch up with Anthropic on productivity features. As part of that push, in March, The Wall Street Journal reported that OpenAI planned to combine the ChatGPT app, Codex, and Atlas into a desktop "superapp" - ChatGPT Work appears to be the result …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ChatGPT浏览器已成过去
zh.summary: OpenAI正在关闭ChatGPT Atlas（其任务自动化浏览器工具），发布不足一年后即将停用，计划于8月9日弃用。此举反映了OpenAI巩固产品并优先考虑生产力功能以与Anthropic竞争的战略。

title: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
summary: Anker's Soundcore Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker is on sale for $69.99 through July 10th (50% off), offering waterproof audio with up to 24-hour battery life. The speaker features a 50W subwoofer and dual 15W tweeters with IPX7 waterproofing and floating capability.
content:
Anker’s Soundcore Boom 2 is fully waterproof.	

Bluetooth speakers with big sound and great features are hard to find for under $100, with most offerings being some variation of the same basic (and often small) design. Thankfully, through July 10th Woot has the Anker Soundcore Boom 2 on sale for $69.99, which is $20 cheaper than the discounted price at other retailers like Amazon, and about half its original $129.99 price. The waterproof Bluetooth speaker can run for up to 24 hours on a single charge, with big, bass-forward sound that’s great for a day by the water or just hanging out in the yard.
Anker Soundcore Boom 2

Where to Buy:

 $129.99 $69.99 at Woot

While size isn’t everything when it comes to Bluetooth speakers, the Soundcore Boom 2’s 50W subwoofer and  pair of 15W tweeters should deliver louder, clearer sound than other speakers around the same price (which are often smaller). The IPX7 rating means it’s fully waterproof and submersible, and its design will let it pump out the tunes, or take calls with its built-in microphone, while it floats in water.
The Boom 2 has a robust set of features for a speaker at this price point. You can adjust the equalizer and the built-in lighting behavior from the Anker app, plus the speaker charges your other devices at up to 5W from its built-in USB-A port. Its support for Anker PartyCast 2.0 lets the Boom 2 sync with other Anker speakers for larger audio. There’s no 3.5mm aux input, which isn’t irregular for waterproof speakers, so it’s Bluetooth only for playback.

zh.title: 可漂浮的强劲Soundcore Boom 2音箱降价超50%
zh.summary: Anker的Soundcore Boom 2蓝牙扬声器正在以69.99美元的价格出售，有效期至7月10日（50%折扣），提供防水音频和长达24小时的电池续航。该扬声器配备50W低音炮和双15W高音扬声器，具有IPX7防水和浮动功能。

title: Allstate accuses Broadcom of auditing it because it quit VMware, CA
summary: Allstate has accused Broadcom of conducting audits in retaliation for terminating its VMware relationship following Broadcom's acquisition of the software company. The dispute highlights tensions in post-acquisition integration and customer relationships.
content: Broadcom accuses Allstate of dodging VMware audits.

zh.title: Allstate指控Broadcom因其退出VMware而进行审计
zh.summary: Allstate指控Broadcom因其终止VMware关系（在Broadcom收购该软件公司后）而进行报复性审计。这场争议突显了收购后整合和客户关系中的紧张关系。

title: Humanoid robots controlled by surgeons did world-first operation on live pigs
summary: Surgeons successfully used humanoid robots to perform a surgical operation on live pigs in a world-first preclinical trial, demonstrating the potential viability of robotic assistance in medical procedures. The experiment represents a major milestone in evaluating remote-controlled humanoid robots for surgery.
content: Preclinical trial is testing the feasibility of humanoid robots in surgery.

zh.title: 外科医生控制的人形机器人对活体猪进行了世界首例手术
zh.summary: 外科医生成功使用人形机器人在活体猪上进行了世界首例手术，在临床前试验中证明了远程控制人形机器人在医疗程序中的潜在可行性。该实验代表了评估远程控制人形机器人用于手术的一个重要里程碑。

title: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
summary: Google has added a "created or edited with AI" label in My Ad Center, allowing users to identify ads generated with AI tools across Google Search, Discover, and YouTube. The label will be automatically applied to ads made with Google's own tools, though labels from other sources require manual application.
content:
You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch. The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under the "how this ad was made" tab. Users can find it by tapping the three dots or info button on ads, which pulls up the same panel where you can also block or report ads.
Google says it will automatically apply the AI label to any ads made with its own generative AI advertising tools, but AI ads made elsewhere will need to have the label applied manually. In some regions, Google's new AI  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Google现在会告诉您广告是否由AI生成
zh.summary: Google在My Ad Center中添加了"使用AI创建或编辑"标签，允许用户识别在Google搜索、Discover和YouTube中使用AI工具生成的广告。该标签将自动应用于使用Google自有工具制作的广告，尽管来自其他来源的标签需要手动应用。

title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
summary: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1, a new AI coding assistant competing with offerings from Anthropic and OpenAI. The product enters a rapidly growing market of AI-powered development tools. This represents Meta's expansion into the competitive AI coding space.
content: Meta's new Muse Spark 1.1. will go up against similar products offered by Anthropic and OpenAI.

zh.title: Meta用Muse Spark 1.1进入拥挤的AI编程竞争市场
zh.summary: Meta推出Muse Spark 1.1，这是一个与Anthropic和OpenAI产品竞争的新型AI编码助手。该产品进入了快速增长的AI驱动开发工具市场。这代表了Meta对竞争激烈的AI编程领域的扩展。

title: Charles Hudson shares the common mistakes he’s seen after investing in 500+ startups
summary: Charles Hudson of Precursor Ventures shares insights from investing in over 500 startups, discussing common mistakes early-stage founders make and how to avoid them. His appearance on the Build Mode podcast addresses current headwinds and funding challenges facing startups. The veteran investor offers practical guidance on improving founders' chances of securing funding.
content: In this week’s episode of Build Mode,  Isabelle Johannessen talks with Precursor Ventures' Charles Hudson about the headwinds facing early-stage founders today and the most common mistakes founders should avoid in order to get funded.

zh.title: Charles Hudson分享了在投资500多家初创公司后看到的常见错误
zh.summary: Precursor Ventures的Charles Hudson分享了投资500多家初创公司的见解，讨论了早期创始人常犯的错误及如何避免这些错误。他在Build Mode播客中的出现讨论了初创公司面临的当前困境和融资挑战。这位资深投资者提供了实用指导，以提高创始人获得融资的机会。

title: Judge doesn't like Elon Musk settlement with SEC, but says court can't block it
summary: A federal judge reluctantly approved a $1.5 million settlement between Elon Musk and the SEC over Twitter stock violations, though expressing concerns about the deal. The court determined it lacked authority to block the settlement despite its reservations. The ruling resolves a legal dispute stemming from Musk's Twitter acquisition.
content: Judge reluctantly approves $1.5M settlement with SEC over Twitter stock violation.

zh.title: 法官不同意Elon Musk与SEC的和解，但表示法院无法阻止
zh.summary: 一位联邦法官虽然对该交易表示担忧，但勉强批准了Elon Musk与SEC之间关于Twitter股票违规的150万美元和解协议。法院裁定其缺乏权力阻止该和解，尽管有其保留意见。这一裁决解决了源于Musk收购Twitter的法律纠纷。

title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
summary: The New York Times and other news publishers allege that OpenAI concealed tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs. The accusation escalates the copyright lawsuit with a motion for sanctions regarding hidden evidence. The allegation raises questions about OpenAI's transparency in using published content for training.
content: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

zh.title: 《纽约时报》称OpenAI在ChatGPT版权诉讼中隐瞒证据
zh.summary: 《纽约时报》和其他新闻出版商指控OpenAI隐瞒了可以识别ChatGPT输出中受版权保护的新闻的工具和数据集。这一指控通过隐瞒证据制裁议案升级了版权诉讼。该指控引发了对OpenAI在使用已发布内容进行训练中透明度的质疑。

title: Slate Auto teams up with Crayola to color its EV truck
summary: Slate Auto has partnered with Crayola to offer its electric trucks in distinctive crayon colors. The collaboration allows EV buyers to customize their vehicles with iconic color options. The partnership represents a unique marketing strategy in the electric vehicle market.
content: Slate has an answer for owners who have always want to drive a truck with bright crayon colors.

zh.summary: Slate Auto与Crayola合作，推出具有独特蜡笔颜色的电动卡车。这一合作使电动汽车购买者能够用标志性颜色选项定制他们的车辆。该合作伙伴关系代表了电动车市场中的独特营销策略。

title: OpenAI may have made a fatal misstep in copyright fight with news orgs
summary: OpenAI faces potential sanctions for allegedly hiding and deleting ChatGPT logs during the New York Times copyright lawsuit. The destruction of evidence could significantly damage the company's legal position in the dispute. This development complicates OpenAI's defense against news organizations' copyright claims.
content: OpenAI may be sanctioned for hiding, deleting ChatGPT logs in NYT copyright fight.

zh.title: OpenAI在与新闻机构的版权争议中可能犯了致命错误
zh.summary: OpenAI因涉嫌在《纽约时报》版权诉讼期间隐瞒和删除ChatGPT日志而面临潜在制裁。证据的销毁可能严重损害该公司在争议中的法律地位。这一发展使OpenAI对新闻机构版权声明的辩护变得更加复杂。

title: FanDuel sent a video from star athlete Bryce Harper to a customer with a gambling problem
summary: FanDuel sent a personalized video message from baseball star Bryce Harper to a customer identified as having a gambling problem. The incident highlights ethical concerns about how betting platforms market to vulnerable users through celebrity endorsements. It raises broader questions about responsible gambling app practices.
content: The video call highlights the murky relationship between professional athletes and gambling apps.

zh.title: FanDuel向一位有赌博问题的顾客发送了棒球明星布莱斯·哈珀的视频
zh.summary: FanDuel向一名被认定有赌博问题的顾客发送了棒球明星布莱斯·哈珀的个性化视频消息。该事件突显了投注平台通过名人代言向易受伤害的用户进行营销的伦理问题。这引发了关于负责任博彩应用实践的更广泛问题。

title: Mercor is in talks for a $20B valuation
summary: AI startup Mercor is negotiating a $20 billion valuation, significantly increasing from its $10 billion valuation in October. The rapid valuation increase reflects growing investor appetite for AI-focused companies. The move positions Mercor among the most highly valued recent AI startups.
content: A new $20 billion valuation would be a giant step up from the $10 billion valuation it reached in October.

zh.title: Mercor正在洽谈200亿美元的估值
zh.summary: AI初创公司Mercor正在谈判200亿美元的估值，相比去年10月的100亿美元估值大幅增长。估值的快速增长反映了投资者对AI公司的日益增长的兴趣。这一举措使Mercor跻身最近估值最高的AI初创公司之列。

title: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
summary: Google is implementing a requirement for advertisers to disclose when ads contain AI-generated or synthetically altered content. Previously, only election ads faced this disclosure requirement. The policy aims to improve transparency around AI-created advertising.
content: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

zh.title: 谷歌现在将披露哪些广告是由人工智能制作的
zh.summary: 谷歌正在实施一项要求，广告商必须披露广告何时包含AI生成或合成修改的内容。以前，只有选举广告需要披露这些信息。该政策旨在提高AI创建广告的透明度。

title: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
summary: French AI voice startup Gradium raised $100 million in seed funding with backing from Nvidia. The capital will fund a new Bay Area office to compete for top AI talent in Silicon Valley. The funding reflects strong investor confidence in AI voice technology development.
content: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

zh.title: 巴黎AI语音初创公司Gradium完成1亿美元种子融资，Nvidia参投
zh.summary: 法国AI语音初创公司Gradium获得1亿美元种子融资，由Nvidia支持。这笔资金将用于在湾区建立新办公室，以在硅谷争夺顶级AI人才。这笔融资反映了投资者对AI语音技术发展的强烈信心。

title: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
summary: Details remain unclear about how government agencies evaluated and approved OpenAI's frontier AI models for release. The regulatory dialogue between government officials and companies like OpenAI and Anthropic lacks public transparency. Questions persist about what safety standards govern approval of advanced AI systems.
content: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

zh.title: 政府是如何决定OpenAI的前沿模型安全可以发布的？
zh.summary: 关于政府机构如何评估和批准OpenAI的前沿AI模型发布的细节仍然不清楚。政府官员与OpenAI和Anthropic等公司之间的监管对话缺乏公开透明度。关于什么安全标准规范先进AI系统的批准仍存在疑问。

title: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
summary: Meta's Muse Image feature generates AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts without explicit owner permission, though users can opt out by making profiles private. The feature raises privacy concerns about using social media content for AI training. It highlights tensions between AI capabilities and user consent.
content: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.

zh.title: Instagram用户注意：如何阻止Meta的AI使用你的照片
zh.summary: Meta的Muse Image功能使用来自公共Instagram账户的照片生成AI图像，无需明确的所有者许可，但用户可以通过将资料设为私密来选择退出。该功能引发了关于将社交媒体内容用于AI训练的隐私问题。它突显了AI能力与用户同意之间的矛盾。

title: Google’s Nest Thermostat has hit its best price of the year
summary: Google's 2020 Nest Thermostat is on sale for $79 (50% off) on Amazon, marking its lowest price of the year. The device offers remote temperature control, scheduling, and energy-saving features through the Google Home app. While lacking premium features like automatic learning, it provides an affordable entry into smart climate control.
content:
Google’s 2020 Nest Thermostat is $50 off. | Photo by Dan Seifert / The Verge	

If you’re looking for a relatively affordable way to cut down on cooling costs, Google’s Nest Thermostat can help. It’s packed with smart controls and energy-saving features, and right now it’s on sale in white for $79 ($50 off), which is its best price of the year, at Amazon. 
Google Nest Thermostat

Where to Buy:

 $129.99 $79 at Amazon

The smart thermostat is quick to install and makes it easy to adjust your home’s temperature whether you’re relaxing in bed or on your way home thanks to the Google Home app. You can also create schedules and control it with your voice using Google Assistant, Alexa, or another Matter-compatible voice assistant.
Once it’s set up, the Nest Thermostat can automatically turn the temperature down when you’re away to help reduce unnecessary energy use, while Google’s Savings Finder feature suggests additional ways to save over time. It also monitors your HVAC system and can alert you if something doesn’t seem right, making it easier to stay on top of maintenance before small issues become bigger, more expensive ones. If you’re eligible, Nest Renew can also automatically shift some of your heating and cooling to times when electricity is cleaner or cheaper.
That said, this is Google’s entry-level model from 2020, so you do miss out on some of the premium features found on the latest Nest Learning Thermostat. Unlike the flagship version, it won’t learn your schedule automatically over time, for example, and lacks support for Nest Temperature Sensors that let you prioritize the temperature in a specific room. Even so, if all you want is an easy way to adjust your home’s temperature remotely and potentially lower your energy bills, the Nest Thermostat is still a solid investment at this price.
Read our Google Nest Thermostat review.

zh.title: 谷歌Nest恒温器创造今年最低价
zh.summary: 谷歌2020年款Nest恒温器在亚马逊上以79美元（五折）出售，创造了今年的最低价格。该设备通过谷歌智能家居应用提供远程温度控制、日程安排和节能功能。虽然缺少自动学习等高级功能，但它为智能气候控制提供了实惠的入门选择。

title: Meta’s new AI chips will begin production in September
summary: Meta will begin production of its custom-designed AI chips in September, using a modular design to accommodate rapid changes in AI requirements. The company is building flexibility into its architecture anticipating significant shifts in AI needs. This move demonstrates Meta's effort to reduce dependence on external chip suppliers.
content: The company is taking a modular approach to designing these chips, anticipating that their needs will change as AI evolves rapidly by the time the chips are in production.

zh.title: Meta新AI芯片将于9月启动生产
zh.summary: Meta将从9月开始生产其定制设计的AI芯片，采用模块化设计以适应AI需求的快速变化。该公司在其架构中建立了灵活性，预期AI需求会出现重大变化。此举表明Meta正在努力减少对外部芯片供应商的依赖。

title: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
summary: Nvidia's success in creating the compute marketplace for AI has paradoxically enabled competitors and simpler technologies to profit while constraining its own margins. The company's dominance in AI accelerators has commoditized infrastructure, allowing others to capture significant market value. Nvidia faces competition from emerging players within the ecosystem it pioneered.
content: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sidelines.

zh.title: 英伟达成为其创造的算力市场的受害者
zh.summary: 英伟达在创建AI算力市场方面的成功，反讽地使竞争对手和更简单的技术从中获利，同时限制了其自身利润。该公司在AI加速器方面的主导地位使基础设施商品化，允许其他公司获得显著的市场价值。英伟达在其开创的生态系统中面临新兴参与者的竞争。

title: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
summary: Microsoft announced it is using AI to identify security issues earlier, resulting in higher volumes of security updates in each monthly Windows 11 release. The shift comes as hackers increasingly leverage AI to exploit vulnerabilities faster, prompting vendors to accelerate patch cycles.
content:
Windows 11 updates could soon include fixes for more security issues at once. Microsoft said in a blog post on Thursday that it's now using AI to "identify potential issues earlier," which means "customers will see a higher volume of security updates included in each security release." 
Hackers, even amateurs, have increasingly been using AI to quickly exploit security weaknesses over the past several months. Security researchers are also using AI to find issues faster, leading to more frequent high-severity vulnerabilities, like the "Copy Fail" exploit that impacted nearly every Linux distribution in May. Similarly, when Anthropic announce …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软的补丁星期二将迎来更大规模更新
zh.summary: 微软宣布将使用AI更早地识别安全问题，导致每个月的Windows 11发布中包含更多的安全更新。随着黑客越来越多地利用AI来快速利用漏洞，这一转变促使供应商加快补丁发布周期。

title: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5.6 to the public following government approval, with CEO Sam Altman calling it "the best model we have ever produced." The company simultaneously unveiled ChatGPT Work, a new AI agent combining ChatGPT and Codex capabilities powered by GPT-5.6 for automating non-technical tasks.
content:
About two weeks after OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama - rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a "limited preview" period - the company has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of the model. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman called it "the best model we have ever produced."
To celebrate, OpenAI also unveiled a new AI agent on the same day: ChatGPT Work. It's billed as a combination of ChatGPT and Codex, allowing the everyday non-technical user to take advantage of Codex's capabilities for non-coding tasks, and it's powered by the GPT-5.6 model suite (Sol, Terra, and Luna). "It can g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI在获得政府批准后推出GPT-5.6——并宣布'ChatGPT Work'
zh.summary: OpenAI已在获得政府批准后向公众发布GPT-5.6，首席执行官Sam Altman称其为"我们迄今为止最好的模型"。该公司同时推出了ChatGPT Work，一个结合ChatGPT和Codex功能的新AI代理，由GPT-5.6驱动，用于自动化非技术性任务。

title: Schlage’s Sense Pro unlocks the door so I don’t have to
summary: Schlage's Sense Pro is a Matter-over-Thread smart lock featuring ultra-wideband technology that automatically unlocks as users approach, eliminating the need for codes or phones. The $399 lock supports Apple Home Key with Google and Samsung integration coming soon.
content:
The Sense Pro is Schlage’s first Matter-over-Thread lock. It also supports hands-free unlocking via Apple Home Key, with Google and Samsung support coming soon through Aliro.	

The Schlage Sense Pro is a beautiful smart lock. Sleek, discreet, and simple to use, it's Schlage's smartest lock to date. Thanks to ultra-wideband (UWB), it unlocks as I walk up to my front door; I don't need to enter a code or tap my phone or press my finger against it. I've tested several hands-free unlocking systems that rely on geofencing and other radio technologies, and UWB is faster and more reliable. It's the first one I actually trust.
The $399 Sense Pro is Schlage's first smart lock with ultra-wideband auto-unlock, its first to support Matter-over-Thread, and its first without a physical keyhole. It works with Apple Home Key for  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Schlage的Sense Pro为我打开门
zh.summary: Schlage的Sense Pro是一个Matter-over-Thread智能锁，具有超宽带技术，可在用户接近时自动解锁，无需代码或手机。这款399美元的锁支持Apple Home Key，Google和Samsung集成即将推出。

title: Surprised doctors find 10-inch worm in man's groin during elective surgery
summary: Doctors unexpectedly discovered a 10-inch parasitic worm in a man's groin during an elective surgical procedure, in what was apparently not the first occurrence of this unusual medical event. The discovery highlights the dangers of certain parasitic infections and the importance of thorough pre-surgical screening.
content: Oddly, it wasn't the first time this had happened to the man.

zh.title: 惊讶的医生在男性腹股沟手术中发现10英寸寄生虫
zh.summary: 医生在选择性手术过程中意外发现男性腹股沟内有一条10英寸的寄生虫，这显然不是第一次发生这种不寻常的医疗事件。这一发现强调了某些寄生虫感染的危害以及彻底的手术前检查的重要性。

title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
summary: Anthropic has launched a Reflect dashboard that visualizes users' Claude usage patterns, showing how deeply the AI has integrated into their daily work. The feature is designed to highlight users' reliance on the chatbot while presenting analysis of their interaction data. This marks Anthropic's entry into the trend of year-in-review features pioneered by platforms like Spotify.
content: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

zh.title: Anthropic 新推出的 Claude 功能正在悄悄地向你推销 AI
zh.summary: Anthropic 推出了一个 Reflect 仪表板，可视化用户的 Claude 使用模式，展示 AI 如何深度融入他们的日常工作。该功能旨在突出用户对聊天机器人的依赖，同时展示他们的交互数据分析。这标志着 Anthropic 进入了由 Spotify 等平台开创的年度回顾功能的趋势。

title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
summary: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX's pending IPOs are projected to create more value than all U.S. venture-backed tech exits from 2000 to 2025 combined. The anticipated valuations underscore massive capital concentration in AI and space technology. This represents a significant shift in how value is being created and distributed in the technology industry.
content: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC backed exits since 2000.

zh.title: Anthropic、OpenAI 和 SpaceX 的规模超过了过去 25 年的科技退出
zh.summary: Anthropic、OpenAI 和 SpaceX 即将进行的 IPO 预计将创造比 2000 年至 2025 年间所有美国风险投资支持的科技退出加起来还要多的价值。预期的估值强调了人工智能和太空技术中的大规模资本集中。这代表了技术行业价值创造和分配方式的重大转变。

title: Conspiracies and regrets abound in Dune: Part Three trailer
summary: The Dune: Part Three trailer has been released, featuring dramatic moments involving conspiracies and character conflicts centered on themes of power and broken promises. The footage teases major plot developments for the final installment of the sci-fi epic.
content: "You promised me that you would never take power in your name."

zh.title: 《沙丘：第三部》预告片充满阴谋与遗憾
zh.summary: 《沙丘：第三部》预告片已发布，展现了涉及阴谋和角色冲突的戏剧性时刻，以权力和破碎的承诺为主题。这段视频为这部科幻史诗的最后一部分展示了重大情节发展。

title: Ruf debuts new flat-eight engine at Goodwood
summary: Ruf has unveiled a new 4.8-liter flat-eight engine at Goodwood that produces over 1,000 horsepower and 1,000 newton-meters of torque. The powerful engine demonstrates Ruf's continued expertise in high-performance automotive engineering.
content: The 4.8 L eight-cylinder generates more than 1,000 hp and 1,000 Nm, Ruf says.

zh.title: Ruf在古德伍德首次推出新型平八缸引擎
zh.summary: Ruf在古德伍德推出了一款新的4.8升平八缸引擎，产生超过1,000马力和1,000牛顿米的扭矩。这款强大的引擎展示了Ruf在高性能汽车工程中的持续专业知识。

title: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are steeply discounted
summary: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are currently on sale for $279, down from their $399 regular price across major retailers. The premium headphones feature industry-leading active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and spatial audio support for Sonos soundbar users. The substantial discount makes high-end wireless headphones more accessible for summer use.
content:
If you’re looking for a discount on a great pair of active noise-canceling headphones for your summer adventures (even if they’re indoors), you’re in luck. The Sonos Ace headphones in black are currently on sale for $279 (usually $399) at a variety of retailers, including Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart, and directly from Sonos. Weirdly, the white version is discounted at all.
The Ace are as comfortable as they are attractive, with an expansive soundstage and balanced sound profile that’s less bass-forward than some competitors released around the same time like the Sony WH-1000XM5. Some people might like that. Their active noise cancellation effect is one of the best we’ve tested yet, with an impressive transparency mode to match, and they can run for up to 30 hours on a single charge.
Sonos Ace
The Sonos Ace are the company’s first set of wireless headphones. They feature a premium, comfortable build and active noise cancellation, along with compatibility with Sonos Arc and other Sonos soundbars.

Where to Buy:

 $399 $279 at Amazon
 $399 $279 at Sonos
 $399 $279 at Best Buy

Those who have a Sonos soundbar can switch the audio over to the Ace headphones with a single button press. You’ll then get spatial audio support with head tracking for watching your movies, TV shows, or playing games. They also support multipoint Bluetooth pairing, with aptX Lossless and AAC codec support, depending on the mobile device you connect it to. The Ace supports lossless audio when linked to devices via USB-C.
Read our Sonos Ace review.
Other deals to consider
If you’re a member of DoorDash’s premium DashPass plan, you can save $30 on a purchase of $100 or more from Best Buy. You can find the discount by navigating to Best Buy in the DoorDash app (iOS or Android), and it will automatically apply to eligible purchases at checkout. The promotion is available through July 15th.
Green Man Gaming is selling a bundle of seven good Lego video games for $9. It includes Steam keys for Lego Star W

zh.title: Sonos Ace 无线耳机大幅折扣
zh.summary: Sonos Ace 无线耳机目前在各大零售商处以 279 美元的价格出售，低于其 399 美元的常规价格。这款高端耳机具有业界领先的主动降噪、30 小时电池续航和对 Sonos 音响条的空间音频支持。这种大幅折扣使高端无线耳机在夏季使用中更加经济实惠。

title: The PocketMage resurrects the PDA with an e-paper screen
summary: Talisman Design is crowdfunding the PocketMage, a clamshell PDA that revives the personal digital assistant category with modern technology including e-paper and OLED displays. The device combines a tactile keyboard with dual-screen technology and is available for pre-order at $185-$235 on Crowd Supply. This represents a nostalgia-driven revival of a device category that became obsolete with the rise of smartphones.
content:
Personal digital assistants like the iconic Palm Pilot were one of many devices we thought went extinct with the arrival of the smartphone. But similar to Canon resurrecting a nearly decade-old digital camera to appeal to point-and-shoot fans, Talisman Design is crowdfunding a clamshell PDA called the PocketMage that combines a tactile keyboard with both e-paper and OLED displays in a pocketable device.
There are two different preorder options for the PocketMage on Crowd Supply, plus you get your choice of parchment (gray) or royal purple accent colors. The $235 version comes fully assembled, while the cheaper $185 version requires you to b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PocketMage 用电子纸屏幕重振个人数字助理
zh.summary: Talisman Design 正在众筹 PocketMage，一款翻盖式个人数字助理，通过电子纸和有机发光二极管等现代技术重新激活了这一类别。该设备结合了触感键盘和双屏技术，在 Crowd Supply 上提供 185-235 美元的预订价格。这代表了一次基于怀旧的复兴，该设备类别随着智能手机的兴起而过时。

title: Sony brings back the superzoom RX10 with a stacked sensor and a high price
summary: Sony has revived the RX10 superzoom camera after nine years with the RX10 V, featuring a new stacked 20.1-megapixel sensor capable of 30fps continuous shooting for action and sports photography. The camera retains the signature 25x zoom lens while delivering significant technical upgrades, though the $2,299.99 price tag is substantially higher than the previous generation. The launch marks Sony's return to the professional-grade all-in-one camera market.
content:
The big boy is back. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Sony is bringing back the RX10 superzoom camera after a nearly nine-year gap between models. The newly announced RX10 V retains the same 24-600mm equivalent f/2.4-4 Zeiss Vario-Sonnar 25x zoom lens of its last two predecessors, but it has lots of upgrades elsewhere. The new 20.1-megapixel 1-inch-type sensor is a stacked design, allowing up to 30fps continuous burst shooting without any blackout (up from the last-gen's 24fps). That's a nice improvement for a camera aimed at action, sports, and wildlife photography, but it will come at a steep cost of $2,299.99 when the camera launches in early August.
The RX10 IV launched at $1,700 in 2017.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼推出配备堆叠传感器和高价格的超变焦 RX10
zh.summary: 索尼在九年后推出 RX10 V 超变焦相机，配备新的堆叠式 2010 万像素传感器，能以 30fps 连拍速度进行运动和体育摄影。该相机保留了标志性的 25 倍变焦镜头，同时提供重大技术升级，但 2299.99 美元的价格标签比上一代大幅上升。此举标志着索尼重返专业级一体化相机市场。

title: Comcast is breaking up with NBCU. Why did it ever buy it in the first place?
summary: Comcast announced it is splitting into separate broadband and entertainment companies, ending its decades-long "content plus pipes" strategy of combining media assets with distribution networks. The breakup reflects the failure of the media-telecom convergence model, which has also been attempted unsuccessfully by AT&T, Verizon, and AOL. This signals a major shift away from the vertical integration approach that once dominated media and telecommunications strategy.
content:
Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Peter Kafka, who is chief correspondent at Business Insider and host of Channels, a podcast about the media industry.
And it’s a big week for the media industry — Comcast just announced that it’s splitting itself up, into the Comcast broadband company and the NBCUniversal entertainment company. That’s after the media giant spun out its cable assets like CNBC and MS.NOW into a new company called Versant earlier this year.
A quick note, by the way — longtime Verge fans know we’ve been disclosing that Comcast NBCUniversal was an investor in our parent company, Vox Media, for years now. That’s come to an end — not only did that investment spin out with Versant, but Vox Media itself is splitting in two, and that Versant stake now lives inside of a shell company that is part of a joint venture with the Penske Media Corporation called PMX, which technically does not exist yet. 
It is very complicated, and I promise I will sort out a simpler disclosure when all of these deals close. But for now the upshot is the same as ever: None of these companies have ever told us what to do or say in our reporting, and we wouldn’t let them if they tried.



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
That is good, because, boy, do Peter and I have a lot to say about Comcast. He and I have been covering media and telecom as friends, peers, and competitors for years now, and Comcast was the biggest bet on the idea that combining media assets like NBC with access and distribution like Comcast’s broadband network would somehow pay off. This idea, which you’ll hear us loosely call content plus pipes, is irresistible to media and telecom people. They cannot stay away from it. 
AT&T tried content plus pipes when it bought Time Warner. Verizon tried content plus pipes when it bought AOL and Yahoo, and, hell, AOL tried content plus pipes when it b

zh.title: 康卡斯特与 NBCU 分手。它为什么一开始要收购它呢？
zh.summary: 康卡斯特宣布将分拆为独立的宽带和娱乐公司，结束了数十年来"内容加管道"战略，即结合媒体资产和分销网络。此次分拆反映了媒体电信融合模式的失败，AT&T、威瑞森和美国在线也曾尝试但均未成功。这标志着从曾经主导媒体和电信战略的垂直整合方式进行重大转变。

title: Meta says its new AI model is ready to compete on coding
summary: Meta has released Muse Spark 1.1, an improved version of its in-house AI coding model with enhanced bug detection, complex task handling, and multimodal capabilities. The company is launching a Meta Model API to enable developers to integrate the model into coding tools and workflows. This represents Meta's competitive effort to challenge existing AI coding assistants and establish itself in the developer tools market.
content:
After reentering the AI race with its first in-house Muse Spark model in April, Meta is now opening up the doors to developers with a new model that can plug into AI coding software with the new Meta Model API.
Meta says that Muse Spark 1.1 is a "step-change" from the first generation, with improvements based on feedback from developers. The company says it's capable of more advanced coding, including detection and fixing of complex bugs; better supports end-to-end agentic workflows across a range of apps, including multi-agent systems; and has native multimodal perception across images, videos, and documents.
The Muse Spark 1.1 launch fol …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta表示其新AI编码模型已准备好与竞争对手抗衡
zh.summary: Meta发布了Muse Spark 1.1，这是其内部AI编码模型的改进版本，具有更好的bug检测、复杂任务处理和多模态功能。该公司正在推出Meta Model API，使开发人员能够将该模型集成到编码工具和工作流中。这代表了Meta与现有AI编码助手竞争并在开发者工具市场确立地位的努力。

title: ICE agents are making house calls for online critics
summary: Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have begun visiting the homes of individuals who have made critical comments about ICE online, including leaving warning notices about threats against ICE personnel. The practice raises significant concerns about free speech implications and government surveillance of online critics. The incident highlights the potential chilling effect on public discourse about government agencies.
content:
A few hours after checking into a hotel in New York City, David Streever woke up to a call from the front desk saying someone was looking for him. 
Streever had just landed on a return trip from Finland, where he'd vacationed with his daughter. Though Streever didn't know it yet, while he'd been away, agents with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) had shown up to his home in Rochester and spoken to his wife. They dropped off a "WARNING NOTICE," which informed Streever that ICE's Office of Professional Responsibility (OPR) is "responsible for enforcing crimes against the United States," including "threats made against ICE personnel."  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ICE特工正在对网络批评家进行家庭访问
zh.summary: 移民和海关执法特工开始访问那些在网上对ICE发表批评评论的个人的家中，包括留下有关对ICE人员威胁的警告通知。这种做法引发了关于言论自由问题和政府对网络批评家监视的重大关切。该事件突出了对关于政府机构的公开讨论可能产生的寒蝉效应。

title: Free Waymo rides in California? You can thank a regulatory quirk.
summary: A regulatory delay in California may allow Waymo to offer free robotaxi rides for an extended period before approval requirements take effect. The quirk in the approval process creates a window where Waymo can operate its Ojai vehicle without certain standard fee regulations. This represents an unusual opportunity for the company to expand its autonomous vehicle service during a transitional regulatory period.
content: State agency's delay could mean free robotaxi rides in company’s new Ojai vehicle for a few months.

zh.title: 加州的免费Waymo乘车？要感谢一项监管漏洞
zh.summary: 加州的监管延迟可能允许Waymo在批准要求生效之前的较长时期内提供免费机器人出租车服务。审批流程中的这个漏洞为Waymo创造了一个时间窗口，使其能够在没有某些标准收费法规约束下运营其Ojai车辆。这代表了该公司在过渡性监管期间扩展自动驾驶汽车服务的一个不寻常机会。

title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
summary: Anthropic has introduced a "reflect" feature for Claude that provides users with year-in-review analytics similar to Spotify Wrapped, showing usage patterns and frequently discussed topics. The dashboard allows users to analyze their Claude interactions over customizable timeframes and understand their task delegation habits. The feature reflects the broader trend of AI companies adopting engagement-focused year-in-review experiences.
content:
The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI. Anthropic on Thursday announced a "reflect" feature for its Claude chatbot, allowing users to see an analysis of their usage data over the past month, three months, six months, or year. 
Anthropic bills the reflection dashboard as a way to "see your patterns and shape them," the company wrote in a blog post. It begins with a summary of an individual's key topics brought up with Claude, as well as types of tasks they delegate and their usage patterns, including peak usage times.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 向Claude Wrapped问好
zh.summary: Anthropic为Claude推出了"reflect"功能，为用户提供类似Spotify Wrapped的年度回顾分析，展示使用模式和频繁讨论的话题。仪表板允许用户在可自定义的时间框架内分析Claude交互，并了解任务委派习惯。该功能反映了人工智能公司采用以参与度为中心的年度回顾体验的更广泛趋势。

title: Character.AI wants a piece of the microdrama pie
summary: Character.AI has launched c.ai Series, AI-generated short-form episodic videos that blend interactive entertainment with its core chatbot functionality. The animated microdramas allow viewers to interact with characters and influence storylines through dialogue. This move positions Character.AI to capture market share in the growing microdrama industry, projected to reach $26 billion in coming years.
content:
Character.AI's plan to become more than just an LLM-powered chatbot platform is going beyond interactive books, comics, and audio dramas. Today, the company announced the debut of c.ai Series - short-form, episodic videos designed to be watched and interacted with - on your phone. 
Unlike traditional microdrama services that feature cheaply produced, live-action shows starring human performers, c.ai Series are animated and almost entirely made with generative AI. The company's interest in getting into the microdrama space isn't surprising considering that it's projected to become a $26 billion industry in the next few years. And even though …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Character.AI欲在微短剧市场分一杯羹
zh.summary: Character.AI推出了c.ai Series，这是由人工智能生成的短篇连续剧视频，将互动娱乐与其核心聊天机器人功能相结合。这些动画微短剧允许观众与角色互动，并通过对话影响故事情节。这一举措使Character.AI能够在增长中的微短剧产业中获得市场份额，该产业预计在未来几年内将达到260亿美元。

title: The newest entrant in the military’s launch competition isn't actually a launch company
summary: A non-launch company has become an unexpected participant in the U.S. military's launch service competition, challenging traditional aerospace industry dominance. The surprise competitor represents a departure from conventional expectations about who can compete for military space contracts. This development suggests evolving priorities or changing criteria in how the Defense Department evaluates launch capabilities.
content: "I think it's fair to say that Phase 3 did not contemplate this."

zh.title: 军方发射竞争中的新参赛者其实不是火箭公司
zh.summary: 一家非发射公司成为美国军方发射服务竞争中的意外参赛者，挑战传统航空航天工业的主导地位。这个令人惊讶的竞争对手代表了对谁可以竞争军事太空合同的传统期望的偏离。这一发展表明国防部在评估发射能力时的优先事项在不断演变或标准在改变。

title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
summary: Ollama, an open-source tool for running AI models locally on personal computers, has raised $65 million in funding and grown to nearly 9 million users. The Benchmark-backed platform has become a popular choice among developers seeking to run AI inference without cloud dependencies. The substantial funding and user base reflect growing demand for accessible, local AI deployment tools.
content: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

zh.title: 流行的开源AI开发工具Ollama融资6500万美元，用户数接近900万
zh.summary: Ollama是一个开源工具，可在个人计算机上本地运行AI模型，已融资6500万美元，用户数增长到近900万。这个由Benchmark支持的平台已成为寻求无需云依赖运行AI推理的开发者的热门选择。大额融资和庞大用户基数反映了人们对可访问、本地AI部署工具的需求不断增长。

title: Character.AI enters the microdrama arena with its own productions, but there’s a twist
summary: Character.AI is launching interactive microdrama productions where viewers can chat with characters, ask questions, and influence story outcomes using the platform's chatbot technology. The approach combines short-form video entertainment with interactive AI dialogue, differentiating it from traditional microdrama services. This strategy leverages Character.AI's existing conversational AI capabilities to create unique engagement opportunities.
content: In an interesting twist that takes advantage of the company's core product, users can chat with these shows' characters, ask them questions, and even roleplay different storylines.

zh.title: Character.AI进入微剧领域推出自己的作品，但有个转折
zh.summary: Character.AI正在推出互动微剧作品，观众可以与角色聊天、提问，并利用该平台的聊天机器人技术影响故事结局。这种方式结合了短视频娱乐与互动AI对话，使其与传统微剧服务有所不同。这一策略充分利用Character.AI现有的对话AI功能创造独特的互动机会。

title: FL Studio 2026 turns its AI chatbot into your assistant engineer
summary: FL Studio 2026 has upgraded its Gopher AI assistant from a passive instruction tool to an active music production assistant capable of executing audio tasks directly. The chatbot can now create drum patterns, adjust audio effects, and make production decisions without manual user intervention. This evolution demonstrates how AI assistants are transitioning from informational helpers to active collaborators in creative workflows.
content:
Gopher can’t play the piano for you, but it can bury it in the mix. | Image: Image Line	

Last year, Image Line introduced Gopher for FL Studio, an AI chatbot that was basically a glorified instruction manual. You asked it how to do something, and it would serve up the relevant instructions. It's the kind of thing I actually use AI for on a semi-regular basis. But in the new release, Gopher can actually execute actions on your behalf. I was able to ask Gopher to lay down a four-on-the-floor kick, with snares on the backbeat, then add a gated reverb on the snare for that '80s pomp, and it executed the instructions flawlessly. 
Gopher does have some limitations. It can't create and draw automation for you. It can't insert notes or …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FL Studio 2026将其AI聊天机器人变成了你的助理工程师
zh.summary: FL Studio 2026已将其Gopher AI助手从被动的指导工具升级为能够直接执行音频任务的活跃音乐制作助手。聊天机器人现在可以创建鼓节奏、调整音频效果，以及在无需手动干预的情况下做出制作决策。这种演变展示了AI助手如何从信息提供者转变为创意工作流中的主动协作者。

title: Payloads used to dictate the terms of launch. That's finally changing.
summary: SpaceX's approach to payload launches is evolving, with the company now dictating terms rather than deferring to customer demands, as demonstrated by innovative designs like the "Starship Pez dispenser." This shift represents a significant change in the commercial spaceflight industry where the launch provider has become dominant.
content: "The Starship Pez dispenser demonstrates very smart industrial design and scale."

zh.title: 有效载荷曾经决定发射条款。这终于在改变了。
zh.summary: SpaceX对有效载荷发射的方式正在演变，该公司现在开始制定条款，而不是听命于客户需求，正如创新设计（如"星舰糖果分配器"）所证明的那样。这一转变代表了商业航天工业的重大变化，其中发射提供商已成为主导力量。

title: Truecaller clashes with India’s telecom regulator over anti-spam rules
summary: Caller ID company Truecaller is in conflict with India's telecom regulator over anti-spam rules, with users increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from dedicated business numbers. The clash highlights tensions between caller ID services and regulatory enforcement.
content: The caller ID company says users are increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from India's dedicated business number series.

zh.title: Truecaller与印度电信监管机构就反垃圾邮件规则发生冲突
zh.summary: 来电显示公司Truecaller与印度电信监管机构在反垃圾邮件规则方面发生冲突，用户越来越多地忽视和拦截来自专业商业号码的呼叫。这场冲突突显了来电显示服务和监管执法之间的紧张关系。
